text:
is a line of figures based on the Shito XX collaboration between GAINAX and (known for his long running manga ').

The figures are Pre-painted PVC with details in ABS plastic with the height of 14 centimeters. It shows Shito (Angels) in anthropomorphized form as beautiful girls. The line was developed by WAVE Corporation. It received a second season called Shito XX: NEXT in 2007. And still in 2007, it received a third season with Super Deformed proportions called Shito XX nano, with figures now in the 10cm scale. https://www.hobby-wave.com/old/LINE_UP/kanseihin/2007/nano/index.html#

Trivia

The first release was supposed to come out in 2005, but it was delayed and only released in 2006.
